title: The Rise of Online Learning: A New Era in Education
passage:
The Rise of Online Learning

In recent years, online learning has become increasingly popular among students and educational institutions. With the advancements in technology, distance education offers a flexible alternative to traditional classroom learning. Students can access a variety of courses from the comfort of their homes, allowing them to balance their studies with other commitments.

One significant advantage of online education is its accessibility. Students from different geographical locations can enroll in courses offered by prestigious universities without having to relocate. Furthermore, online platforms often provide a wealth of resources, including videos, articles, and interactive assignments, which enhance the learning experience.

However, online learning also presents challenges. One major concern is the lack of face-to-face interaction with instructors and peers, which can lead to feelings of isolation. Moreover, self-discipline is crucial for success in this environment, as students must manage their time effectively to meet deadlines.

Despite these challenges, the demand for online education continues to grow. Many institutions are expanding their online offerings, and employers increasingly value the skills developed through such programs. As a result, online learning is likely to play a significant role in the future of education.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one benefit of online learning mentioned in the passage?

options.B: It provides a flexible learning environment.
options.D: It is limited to local students.

questions.explanation: Option B is correct because the passage states that online education offers a flexible alternative to traditional learning.

questions.text: Online learning can lead to feelings of isolation.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that one major concern is the lack of face-to-face interaction, which can lead to feelings of isolation.

questions.text: The author believes that online learning will not be popular in the future.
questions.explanation: The passage indicates that the demand for online education continues to grow, suggesting that the author believes it will be popular in the future.

questions.text: Match the following statements with the appropriate paragraphs.

options.1: Online education is associated with prestigious universities.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentence with NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
questions.text: One challenge of online learning is the lack of ________ with instructors.
questions.explanation: The passage discusses the challenge of lacking face-to-face interaction with instructors.

questions.instruction: Complete the summary using NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
questions.text: Online learning is growing due to its ________ and the value placed on skills by employers.
questions.explanation: The passage states that accessibility is one of the significant advantages of online learning.

vocabulary.meaning: having a high reputation; respected and admired.
the ability to control oneself, especially in terms of behavior and emotions.
to improve the quality, value, or extent of something.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

To succeed in this passage, focus on the main ideas and details within each paragraph. Pay special attention to the advantages and challenges of online learning. Look for keywords that indicate the author's opinion and be prepared to differentiate between fact and opinion in the questions.
